title: helianthemum grandiflorum f. multiplex
intro: Helianthemum grandiflorum f. multiplex, also known as rockrose or sun rose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family. It is rich in flavonoids, particularly kaempferol and quercetin, which have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable medicinal herb. The health benefits of Helianthemum grandiflorum f. multiplex include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
